title: pilea rivularis var. stipulata
intro: Pilea rivularis var. stipulata, also known as 'Stipulated Pilea', is a rare and unique variety of the Pilea rivularis plant, characterized by its distinctive stipules. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pilea rivularis var. stipulata are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
